steps.title: Evaluate g(13a) and g(8a) using the sign constraint
steps.content:
Since $a \lt 0$, both $13a$ and $8a$ are negative. For negative numbers, $|x| = -x$, so:
$$g(13a) = \frac{|13a|}{a} - 12 = \frac{-13a}{a} - 12 = -13 - 12 = -25$$
$$g(8a) = \frac{|8a|}{a} - 12 = \frac{-8a}{a} - 12 = -8 - 12 = -20$$

steps.title: Compute the product of the two values
